===Pokémon X and Y===
[[File:Viola Gym Battle XY.png|thumb|left|250px|Viola challenging the player]]
Viola is the first Gym Leader to be challenged by the [[Player character|player]]. {{pkmn|Trainer}}s who defeat her will be given the {{badge|Bug}}, along with {{TM|83|Infestation}}. She is the younger sister of [[Alexa]], a reporter based in the Kalos region.<ref name=AlexaSister>''"Oh, Viola! Viola is the Gym Leader of Santalune City. Not only is she an expert with Bug-type Pokémon, but she’s also an up-and-coming photography pro! Her older sister, Alexa, happens to be a reporter!"''</ref> She is also seemingly good friends with fellow Gym Leader [[Valerie]], who gifted her the barrette that her hair is tied in for her birthday.<ref name=Barrette>''"Hooray! Viola has arrived! She’s fabulous! So fabulous! I’m so crazy about those eyebrows! The barrette that Viola always wears is a birthday gift from Valerie!"''</ref>

As well as being a Gym Leader, Viola is a professional photographer. According to the [[television]] show ''Gym Freaks'', Viola's camera was a birthday gift from Alexa.<ref name=CameraGift>''"Oooh... Ahhh... Viola has arrived! She’s fabulous! So fabulous! I’m so crazy about those eyebrows! The camera that Viola always has is a birthday gift from her sister, Alexa. Awww. If I was born again, I’d like to be the camera."''</ref> She seems to massively enjoy photography, often speaking with analogies surrounding cameras or photography in general. Her work, such as "To be Evolved" and "Nectar's Siren Song" can be found on the first floor of the Santalune Gym. Viola says "fantastic" frequently, both in Pokémon X and Y, as well as in [[Pokémon Masters EX]], where she pronounces it as "fantastique" with a French accent.<ref name=Fantastic>''"You and your Pokémon have shown me a whole new depth of field! Fantastic! Just fantastic!"''</ref>
